fields.name: device_id
fields.description: Fixed device ID code of 0xE5 (345 octal).

fields.name: thresh_tap
fields.description: Threshold value for tap interrupts. Unsigned data format. Scale factor is 62.5 mg/LSB (0xFF = +16 g). A value of 0 may result in undesirable behavior if tap/double tap interrupts are enabled.

fields.name: ofsx
fields.description: X-axis offset adjustment in twos complement format with a scale factor of 15.6 mg/LSB (0x7F = +2 g).

fields.name: ofsy
fields.description: Y-axis offset adjustment in twos complement format with a scale factor of 15.6 mg/LSB (0x7F = +2 g).

fields.name: z_offset
fields.description: Z-axis offset adjustment in two's complement format with a scale factor of 15.6 mg/LSB (0x7F = +2 g).

fields.name: dur
fields.description: Unsigned time value representing the maximum time that an event must be above the THRESH_TAP threshold to qualify as a tap event. The scale factor is 625 μs/LSB. A value of 0 disables the tap/double tap functions.

fields.name: latency
fields.description: Unsigned time value representing the wait time from the detection of a tap event to the start of the time window (defined by the window register) during which a possible second tap event can be detected. The scale factor is 1.25 ms/LSB. A value of 0 disables the double tap function.

fields.name: window
fields.description: Unsigned time value representing the amount of time after the expiration of the latency time (determined by the latent register) during which a second valid tap can begin. The scale factor is 1.25 ms/LSB. A value of 0 disables the double tap function.

fields.name: thresh_act
fields.description: Threshold value for detecting activity. Unsigned data format. Scale factor: 62.5 mg/LSB. A value of 0 may result in undesirable behavior if activity interrupt is enabled.

fields.name: thresh_inact
fields.description: Threshold value for detecting inactivity. The data format is unsigned, so the magnitude of the inactivity event is compared with the value in the THRESH_INACT register. The scale factor is 62.5 mg/LSB. A value of 0 mg may result in undesirable behavior if the inactivity interrupt is enabled.

fields.name: time_inact
fields.description: Unsigned time value representing the amount of time that acceleration must be less than the value in the THRESH_INACT register for inactivity to be declared. The scale factor is 1 sec/LSB. Unlike the other interrupt functions, which use unfiltered data (see the Threshold section), the inactivity function uses filtered output data. At least one output sample must be generated for the inactivity interrupt to be triggered. This results in the function appearing unresponsive if the TIME_INACT register is set to a value less than the time constant of the output data rate. A value of 0 results in an interrupt when the output data is less than the value in the THRESH_INACT register.

fields.name: act_ac_dc
fields.description: ACT AC/DC coupling mode. 0 selects dc-coupled operation (current acceleration compared directly with thresholds). 1 enables ac-coupled operation (new samples compared to a reference value from start of detection).

fields.name: act_x_en
fields.description: Activity detection X-axis enable. 1 enables x-axis participation in activity detection. 0 excludes x-axis.

fields.name: act_y_en
fields.description: Activity detection Y-axis enable. 1 enables y-axis participation in activity detection. 0 excludes y-axis.

fields.name: act_z_en
fields.description: Activity detection Z-axis enable. 1 enables z-axis participation in activity detection. 0 excludes z-axis.

fields.name: inact_ac_dc
fields.description: INACT AC/DC coupling mode. 0 selects dc-coupled operation (current acceleration compared directly with thresholds). 1 enables ac-coupled operation (uses reference value updated when exceeding threshold; compares magnitude of difference with THRESH_INACT).

fields.name: inact_x_en
fields.description: Inactivity detection X-axis enable. 1 enables x-axis participation in inactivity detection. 0 excludes x-axis.

fields.name: inact_y_en
fields.description: Inactivity detection Y-axis enable. 1 enables y-axis participation in inactivity detection. 0 excludes y-axis.

fields.name: inact_z_en
fields.description: Inactivity detection Z-axis enable. 1 enables z-axis participation in inactivity detection. 0 excludes z-axis.

fields.name: thresh_ff
fields.description: Threshold value, in unsigned format, for free-fall detection. The root-sum-square (RSS) value of all axes is calculated and compared with this value to determine if a free-fall event occurred. Scale factor: 62.5 mg/LSB. A value of 0 mg may result in undesirable behavior if the free-fall interrupt is enabled. Recommended values: 300 mg to 600 mg (0x05 to 0x09).

fields.name: time_ff
fields.description: Unsigned time value representing the minimum time that the RSS value of all axes must be less than THRESH_FF to generate a free-fall interrupt. Scale factor: 5 ms/LSB. A value of 0 may result in undesirable behavior if the free-fall interrupt is enabled. Values between 100 ms and 350 ms (0x14 to 0x46) are recommended.

fields.name: reserved
fields.description: Reserved bits. Must be written with 0.

fields.name: suppress
fields.description: Suppress bit. Setting the suppress bit suppresses double tap detection if acceleration greater than the value in THRESH_TAP is present between taps.

fields.name: tap_x_enable
fields.description: TAP_X enable bit. A setting of 1 enables x-axis participation in tap detection. A setting of 0 excludes the x-axis from participation in tap detection.

fields.name: tap_y_enable
fields.description: TAP_Y enable bit. A setting of 1 enables y-axis participation in tap detection. A setting of 0 excludes the y-axis from participation in tap detection.

fields.name: tap_z_enable
fields.description: TAP_Z enable bit. A setting of 1 enables z-axis participation in tap detection. A setting of 0 excludes the z-axis from participation in tap detection.

fields.name: reserved
fields.description: Reserved bit, always reads as 0.

fields.name: act_x
fields.description: Activity source on X-axis. 1 indicates involvement in activity event.

fields.name: act_y
fields.description: Activity source on Y-axis. 1 indicates involvement in activity event.

fields.name: act_z
fields.description: Activity source on Z-axis. 1 indicates involvement in activity event.

fields.name: asleep
fields.description: Asleep status. 1 indicates the part is asleep.

fields.name: tap_x
fields.description: Tap source on X-axis. 1 indicates involvement in tap/double tap event.

fields.name: tap_y
fields.description: Tap source on Y-axis. 1 indicates involvement in tap/double tap event.

fields.name: tap_z
fields.description: Tap source on Z-axis. 1 indicates involvement in tap/double tap event.

fields.name: reserved
fields.description: Reserved bits; must be set to 0.

fields.name: low_power
fields.description: LOW_POWER: 0 = normal operation; 1 = reduced power operation (higher noise).

fields.name: rate
fields.description: Rate bits select device bandwidth and output data rate (see Table 6 and Table 7). Default 0x0A = 100 Hz.

fields.name: wakeup
fields.description: Controls the frequency of readings in sleep mode. 00=8Hz, 01=4Hz, 10=2Hz, 11=1Hz.

fields.name: sleep
fields.description: 0=normal operation, 1=sleep mode (suppresses DATA_READY, stops FIFO data, uses wakeup frequency).

fields.name: measure
fields.description: 0=standby mode, 1=measurement mode.

fields.name: auto_sleep
fields.description: If link=1, 1=switch to sleep on inactivity detection, 0=disable autosleep.

fields.name: link
fields.description: 1=link activity/inactivity (activity after inactivity), 0=concurrent.

fields.name: reserved
fields.description: Reserved, must be 0.

fields.name: reserved
fields.description: Reserved, must be 0.

fields.name: data_ready
fields.description: Enables the DATA_READY interrupt. Setting to 1 enables interrupt generation when new data is available; the function is always enabled.

fields.name: single_tap
fields.description: Enables the SINGLE_TAP interrupt. Setting to 1 enables interrupt generation on single tap detection.

fields.name: double_tap
fields.description: Enables the DOUBLE_TAP interrupt. Setting to 1 enables interrupt generation on double tap detection.

fields.name: activity
fields.description: Enables the Activity interrupt. Setting to 1 enables interrupt generation on activity detection.

fields.name: inactivity
fields.description: Enables the Inactivity interrupt. Setting to 1 enables interrupt generation on inactivity detection.

fields.name: free_fall
fields.description: Enables the FREE_FALL interrupt. Setting to 1 enables interrupt generation on free-fall detection.

fields.name: watermark
fields.description: Enables the Watermark interrupt. Setting to 1 enables interrupt generation when FIFO watermark is reached; the function is always enabled.

fields.name: overrun
fields.description: Enables the Overrun interrupt. Setting to 1 enables interrupt generation when FIFO overrun occurs; the function is always enabled.

fields.name: data_ready
fields.description: DATA_READY interrupt mapping: 0 sends interrupt to INT1 pin, 1 sends to INT2 pin

fields.name: single_tap
fields.description: SINGLE_TAP interrupt mapping: 0 sends interrupt to INT1 pin, 1 sends to INT2 pin

fields.name: double_tap
fields.description: DOUBLE_TAP interrupt mapping: 0 sends interrupt to INT1 pin, 1 sends to INT2 pin

fields.name: activity
fields.description: Activity interrupt mapping: 0 sends interrupt to INT1 pin, 1 sends to INT2 pin

fields.name: inactivity
fields.description: Inactivity interrupt mapping: 0 sends interrupt to INT1 pin, 1 sends to INT2 pin

fields.name: free_fall
fields.description: FREE_FALL interrupt mapping: 0 sends interrupt to INT1 pin, 1 sends to INT2 pin

fields.name: watermark
fields.description: Watermark interrupt mapping: 0 sends interrupt to INT1 pin, 1 sends to INT2 pin

fields.name: overrun
fields.description: Overrun interrupt mapping: 0 sends interrupt to INT1 pin, 1 sends to INT2 pin

fields.name: overrun
fields.description: Indicates if overrun event has occurred (1=triggered, 0=not occurred). Always set if event occurs regardless of INT_ENABLE, cleared by reading DATAX, DATAY, DATAZ registers.

fields.name: watermark
fields.description: Indicates if watermark event has occurred (1=triggered, 0=not occurred). Always set if event occurs regardless of INT_ENABLE, cleared by reading DATAX, DATAY, DATAZ registers. May require multiple reads per FIFO mode descriptions.

fields.name: free_fall
fields.description: Indicates if free-fall event has occurred (1=triggered, 0=not occurred). Cleared by reading INT_SOURCE register.

fields.name: inactivity
fields.description: Indicates if inactivity event has occurred (1=triggered, 0=not occurred). Cleared by reading INT_SOURCE register.

fields.name: activity
fields.description: Indicates if activity event has occurred (1=triggered, 0=not occurred). Cleared by reading INT_SOURCE register.

fields.name: double_tap
fields.description: Indicates if double-tap event has occurred (1=triggered, 0=not occurred). Cleared by reading INT_SOURCE register.

fields.name: single_tap
fields.description: Indicates if single-tap event has occurred (1=triggered, 0=not occurred). Cleared by reading INT_SOURCE register.

fields.name: data_ready
fields.description: Indicates if data ready event has occurred (1=triggered, 0=not occurred). Always set if event occurs regardless of INT_ENABLE, cleared by reading DATAX, DATAY, DATAZ registers. May require multiple reads per FIFO mode descriptions.

fields.name: self_test
fields.description: A setting of 1 applies a self-test force to the sensor, causing a shift in the output data. A value of 0 disables the self-test force.

fields.name: spi
fields.description: A value of 1 sets the device to 3-wire SPI mode, and a value of 0 sets the device to 4-wire SPI mode.

fields.name: int_invert
fields.description: A value of 0 sets the interrupts to active high, and a value of 1 sets the interrupts to active low.

fields.name: reserved
fields.description: Reserved bit; must be set to 0.

fields.name: full_res
fields.description: When set to 1, the device is in full resolution mode (4 mg/LSB scale factor). When 0, the device is in 10-bit mode.

fields.name: justify
fields.description: A setting of 1 selects left (MSB) justified mode, and a setting of 0 selects right justified mode with sign extension.

fields.name: x_axis_data_lsb
fields.description: Least significant byte (Bits [7:0]) of the X-axis acceleration output data in twos complement format. The data format (resolution, range, justification) is controlled by the DATA_FORMAT register (Address 0x31).

fields.name: x_axis_msb
fields.description: Most significant byte of the X-axis acceleration output data in twos complement format. Part of the 16-bit X-axis value (DATAX0 is LSB, DATAX1 is MSB). Data format controlled by DATA_FORMAT register (0x31).

fields.name: y_axis_data_lsb
fields.description: Least significant byte of the Y-axis output data in twos complement format. Part of the 16-bit Y-axis acceleration value (DATAY0 [Bits 0:7], DATAY1 [Bits 0:7]). Data format controlled by DATA_FORMAT register (Address 0x31).

fields.name: y_axis_msb
fields.description: Most significant byte of the 16-bit twos complement Y-axis output data.

fields.name: z_data_lsb
fields.description: Least significant byte of Z-axis acceleration output data in twos complement format. Format controlled by DATA_FORMAT register (0x31).

fields.name: z_data_15_8_
fields.description: Z-axis acceleration output data, most significant byte in two's complement format. The DATA_FORMAT register (Address 0x31) controls the data format, including resolution, range, justification, and self-test.

fields.name: fifo_mode
fields.description: Sets the FIFO operating mode: 00 = Bypass (FIFO bypassed), 01 = FIFO (collects up to 32 values then stops until not full), 10 = Stream (holds last 32 values, overwrites oldest when full), 11 = Trigger (holds last n samples before trigger, then collects until full).

fields.name: trigger
fields.description: Links trigger event in trigger mode to interrupt pin: 0 = INT1, 1 = INT2.

fields.name: samples
fields.description: 5-bit field for sample count; function varies by FIFO mode (Bypass: none; FIFO/Stream: entries to trigger watermark interrupt; Trigger: samples retained before trigger event). Value of 0 sets watermark immediately regardless of mode.

fields.name: fifo_trig
fields.description: A 1 in the FIFO_TRIG bit corresponds to a trigger event occurring, and a 0 means that a FIFO trigger event has not occurred.

fields.name: reserved
fields.description: Reserved bit that always reads as 0.

fields.name: entries
fields.description: These bits report how many data values are stored in FIFO.
